name: Velora Social Kit
description: Use a reusable template for an editorial founder social kit with refined serif typography, strict margins, muted neutrals, and deep red accents. This source-neutral adaptation replaces the inspiration's name, slogans, logos, handles, and media with fictional Velora copy plus CSS-drawn marks and abstract photo crops.
